title: EWC 2026 in Paris: Behind the scenes of the controversial partnership between France and Saudi Arabia in esports
subhed: By hosting this Saudi video game tournament in Paris, with an opening ceremony on Wednesday, July 8, featuring a concert by Aya Nakamura, the Elysée is endorsing the kingdom's dominance in the sector – but not without facing criticism from the French esports community.

title: Tour de France: Kooij wins 5th stage in chaotic sprint finish
subhed: Olav Kooij, a 24-year-old Dutch debutant Tour contender, beat German Max Kanter into second, with Belgian Tim Merlier coming in third place for the Tour de France's fifth stage, after several riders crashed and others were slowed.

title: 2026 World Cup: Recent FIFA decisions ramp up pressure on referees
subhed: From the Balogun case to the appointment of an all-Argentinian refereeing team for the France-Morocco match on Thursday, FIFA itself has shaken the refereeing corps, undermining their authority and fueling suspicions of bias.
